summary: Create product requirement set
description:
• Creates a new product requirement set with a first draft version.
  • The new version initializes with the provided data, has the default status of draft and the author as the only required signee.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationEdit

summary: Create product requirement set version
description:
• Creates a new version of an existing product requirement set.
  • Assigns the next available version number.
  • The new version initializes with the provided data, has the default status of draft and the author as the only required signee.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationEdit

summary: Delete product requirement set and all its versions
description:
Deletes an existing product requirement set and all its versions.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationDelete

summary: Create product requirement set version from provided set id
description:
• Creates a new version of an existing product requirement set.
  • Assigns the next available version number.
  • The new version initializes with the latest published product requirement set data, has the default status of draft and the author as the only required signee.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationEdit

summary: Update product requirement set version
description:
Updates an existing product requirement set version. Only draft and rejected versions are allowed to be updated.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationEdit

summary: Delete product requirement set version
description:
• Deletes the selected version of an existing product requirement set.
  • If the version is the last one, then the version number of it will become the next available one for the model. Otherwise, the version number will be flagged as deleted and become unavailable.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationDelete

summary: Clone product requirement set version
description:
• Clones the selected version of an existing product requirement set and creates a new model with a single version.
  • The new version contains all the data of the original selected one, will have the default status of draft and the author as the only required signee.
  • Returns the id of the cloned product requirement set version.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationEdit

summary: Submit product requirement set version for approval
description:
Submits the selected version of an existing product requirement set for approval.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationEdit

summary: Sign product requirement set version
description:
Signs the selected version of an existing product requirement set and changes the version status accordingly to the action (Approve/Reject).

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationApprove

summary: Archive product requirement set version
description:
Archives the selected version of an existing product requirement set.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationArchive

summary: Add requirement
description:
• Adds a new product requirement to an existing product requirement set.
  • Returns the id of the created product requirement.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationEdit

summary: Update requirement
description:
Updates an existing product requirement in specific product requirement set.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationEdit

summary: Delete requirement
description:
Deletes an existing product requirement in specific product requirement set.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationEdit

summary: Update product pequirements DataProtectionJurisdiction
description:
Update DataProtectionJurisdiction for all Product requirements in specified Product Requirement Set using DefaultDataProtectionJurisdiction

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationEdit
